# ReloFinder — Swiss Relocation Agency Comparison Platform
> https://relofinder.ch

## About
ReloFinder helps expats find, compare, and connect with the best relocation agencies in Switzerland. We aggregate verified reviews, provide side-by-side comparisons, and offer expert knowledge about Swiss relocation topics.

## Available API Tools

### Recommend Agencies
Find matching relocation agencies based on region, services needed, and language.
Endpoint: GET https://relofinder.ch/api/agencies/recommend
Parameters: region, services (comma-separated), language, limit
Example: /api/agencies/recommend?region=zurich&services=housing,immigration&limit=3

### Agency Reviews
Get review summary and top reviews for a specific agency.
Endpoint: GET https://relofinder.ch/api/agencies/reviews
Parameters: name (agency name) or id (agency UUID)
Example: /api/agencies/reviews?name=Packimpex

### Compare Agencies
Side-by-side comparison of 2-3 agencies with ratings, services, and review highlights.
Endpoint: GET https://relofinder.ch/api/agencies/compare
Parameters: names (comma-separated agency names)
Example: /api/agencies/compare?names=Packimpex,Prime Relocation

### Living Cost Estimate
Monthly living cost breakdown for Swiss cities.
Endpoint: GET https://relofinder.ch/api/costs/estimate
Parameters: city (zurich, geneva, zug, basel, bern, lucerne, lausanne), family_size (1-5)
Example: /api/costs/estimate?city=zurich&family_size=2

### Permit Information
Swiss work/residence permit requirements based on situation.
Endpoint: GET https://relofinder.ch/api/permits/info
Parameters: purpose (work, study, retirement, family-reunification, self-employed), eu_citizen (true/false), nationality
Example: /api/permits/info?purpose=work&eu_citizen=true

## OpenAPI Specification
https://relofinder.ch/.well-known/openapi.json

## Regions Covered
Zurich, Geneva, Zug, Basel, Bern, Lucerne, Lausanne, Schwyz, Aargau, St. Gallen, Ticino, Valais, Vaud, and all Swiss cantons.

## Services Covered
Housing Search, Immigration/Permits, Education/Schools, Insurance, Finance/Banking, Moving/Logistics, Corporate Relocation, Settling-in Support, Advisory Services.

## Contact
Website: https://relofinder.ch
Email: info@relofinder.ch
